hero.title: Space Jam
hero.reason: In honor of National Teacher Appreciation Day, let's appreciate the teaching skills of Mr. Shhh in this unforgettable classic, where Michael Jordan teams up with Looney Tunes to save their planet.
hero.blurb: This movie is a nostalgic blast from the past, bringing together the worlds of sports and cartoons in a hilarious and action-packed way. With its lighthearted humor and entertaining storyline, it's a great choice for the whole family to enjoy. The combination of live-action and animation is still impressive today.

released.title: Spider-Man 3
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this superhero blockbuster brought the web-slinging hero back to the big screen with a darker and more complex storyline, exploring the consequences of Peter Parker's actions.
released.blurb: The third installment in the Spider-Man trilogy, this movie offers plenty of action, drama, and romance, with a talented cast and impressive visual effects. Although it received mixed reviews at the time, it remains a fun and entertaining addition to the Marvel universe.

birthday.title: Wild at Heart
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Nicholas Cage, born May 7, 1964, starring in this crime drama as Sailor Ripley, a rough-riding ex-con with a heart of gold.
birthday.blurb: This film is a gripping and intense adaptation of Barry Gifford's novel, with Cage delivering a powerful performance alongside Laura Dern. The chemistry between the leads is undeniable, and the supporting cast adds to the movie's dark charm.

awful.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
awful.reason: This mind-bogglingly bad action movie has gained a cult following for its absurdity and over-the-top performances, making it a must-see for fans of so-bad-it's-good cinema.
awful.blurb: With a convoluted plot, cringe-worthy dialogue, and atrocious acting, this film is a masterclass in how not to make an action movie. Its inadvertent humor and sheer audacity make it a guilty pleasure that's hard to look away from.
